description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, punctuated by large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front features a recessed entryway and a set of wide windows, while the side and rear elevations display a mix of window sizes and a back door. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions, modern furnishings, and a central green feature, possibly an indoor garden or atrium. The structure sits on a paved base, suggesting integration with an urban sidewalk or driveway. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a connection to outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a light gray facade, featuring an open interior layout and a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows and a recessed entryway, set on a paved surface.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front corner, entryway, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior with modern furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a back door, smaller windows, and the continuation of the flat roof and gray exterior.
description_view_3: Side view revealing grouped windows, interior partitions, and the central green feature inside the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
